use_cases: Landing page ambient background with interactive cursor-following color effects
Portfolio or creative site visual enhancement with soft gradient blurs
Marketing hero section decorative element to increase visual engagement
Interactive experience layer for gamified user interfaces
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based gradient blur component that creates colorful, soft radial gradients following the user's cursor. The effect generates random RGB colors with smooth opacity decay, producing a dreamy, trailing glow effect. Best used as an ambient visual layer behind content or as an engaging hero section decoration.
